selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":64,"gender":"man","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"startup founder","city_of_living":"Chicago","employment_status":"employed part-time","education_level":"bachelor's degree","parents_education":{"parent_1":"no formal education","parent_2":"no formal education"},"current_marital_status":"divorced","children":2,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"depressed","religious_beliefs":"Buddhism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend several hours daily on social media","hobbies":["volunteering","birdwatching"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":33,"level":"moderate"},"conscientiousness":{"score":56,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":47,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":39,"level":"moderate"},"neuroticism":{"score":34,"level":"moderate"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, I would suggest the following steps: 1) Be cautious of sensationalized headlines or posts that seem too good (or bad) to be true. 2) Verify the credibility of the source by checking their reputation or fact-checking websites. 3) Use fact-checking tools provided by social media platforms, such as Facebook's
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: My reasoning is based on my experience as a startup founder and my education level. I understand the importance of verifying sources and being cautious when consuming information online. I also appreciate the fact that social media platforms are taking steps to address the issue of fake content by providing fact-checking tools.
